Module contents¶

Module

__init__.py

Copyright

See the GNU General Public License for more details. You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License along with this program. If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.

Info

Initialization for config_io package.

class ats_utilities.config_io.ConfFile(file_path: str | None, file_mode: str | None, file_format: str | None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IConfFile

Defines class ConfFile with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the configuration context manager. Configuration file context manager.

It defines:

attributes:
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__checker - IATSChecker for check operations.
__reporter - ATSReporter for check operations.
__file_path - Configuration file name.
__file_mode - File mode.
__file_format - File format.
__file - File object.
methods:
__init__ - Initials ConfFile constructor.
__enter__ - Opens configuration file in mode.
__exit__ - Closes configuration file.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
class ats_utilities.config_io.FileCheck(checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IFileCheck

Defines class FileCheck with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for checking operations with files. Mechanism for checking files.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Marks error types.
__checker - ATSChecker for check operations.
__reporter - ATSReporter for check operations.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__file_path_ok - File exist, path ok.
__file_mode_ok - Supported file mode.
__file_format_ok - File format is (not) expected.
methods:
__init__ - Initials FileCheck constructor.
check_path - Checks file path.
check_mode - Checks operation mode for file.
check_format - Checks file format by extension.
is_file_ok - Returns status for file.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
check_format(file_path: str | None, file_format: str | None, verbose: bool = False) → None[source]¶

Checks file format by extension.

Parameters:

  • file_path (<Optional[str]>) – File path | None

  • file_format (<Optional[str]>) – File format (file extension) | None

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Exceptions:

ATSTypeError

check_mode(file_mode: str | None, verbose: bool = False) → None[source]¶

Checks operation mode for file.

Parameters:

  • file_mode (<Optional[str]>) – File mode (‘r’, ‘w’, ‘a’, ‘b’, ‘x’, ‘t’, ‘+’)

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Exceptions:

ATSTypeError

check_path(file_path: str | None, verbose: bool = False) → None[source]¶

Checks file path.

Parameters:

  • file_path (<Optional[str]>) – File path | None

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Exceptions:

ATSTypeError

is_file_ok() → bool[source]¶

Returns status for file.

Returns:

True (file validated and ok) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None

class ats_utilities.config_io.IConfFile[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class IConfFile with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an interface for configuration file context manager.

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
__enter__ - Opens configuration file in mode (abstract).
__exit__ - Closes configuration file (abstract).
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
class ats_utilities.config_io.IFileCheck[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class IFileCheck with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an interface for file checking operations.

It defines:

attributes:
MODES - Mode file operations.
TRUSTED_EXTENSIONS - List of trusted file extensions.
methods:
check_path - Check file path (abstract).
check_mode - Check file mode (abstract).
check_format - Check file format by extension (abstract).
is_file_ok - Return aggregated file status (abstract).
MODES: List[str] = ['r', 'w', 'a', 'b', 'x', 't', '+']¶
TRUSTED_EXTENSIONS: List[str] = ['makefile']¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract check_format(file_path: str | None, file_format: str | None, verbose: bool = False) → None[source]¶

Check file format by extension.

Parameters:

  • file_path (<Optional[str]>) – File path | None

  • file_format (<Optional[str]>) – File format (extension) | None

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract check_mode(file_mode: str | None, verbose: bool = False) → None[source]¶

Check file mode.

Parameters:

  • file_mode (<Optional[str]>) – File mode | None

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract check_path(file_path: str | None, verbose: bool = False) → None[source]¶

Check file path.

Parameters:

  • file_path (<Optional[str]>) – File path | None

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract is_file_ok() → bool[source]¶

Return aggregated file status.

Returns:

True if file checks passed | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

class ats_utilities.config_io.IRead[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class IRead with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an interface for reading from configuration files.

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
read_configuration - Read configuration from file (abstract).
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶

Read configuration from file.

Parameters:

verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Returns:

Configuration object

Return type:

<Any>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

class ats_utilities.config_io.IWrite[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class IWrite with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an interface for writing to configuration files.

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
write_configuration - Write configuration to file (abstract).
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract write_configuration(config: Any, verbose: bool = False) → bool[source]¶

Write configuration to file.

Parameters:

  • config (<Any>) – Configuration object | None

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Returns:

True if written | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError
